_comment: Claude Code plugin marketplace manifest. Verified against the current plugin schema shape: top-level {name, owner:{name}, plugins:[{name, source, description}]}. SCHEMA UNCERTAINTY: the `renames` map below is a forward-compat/day-one convention — as of this writing the marketplace loader may ignore unknown top-level keys rather than act on them. It is declared now so that WHEN rename/migration support lands (or a wrapper reads it), existing installs of an old plugin/slug auto-migrate to the current name instead of orphaning. Keys are prior names; values are the current plugin name. Covers the anticipated free->paid rename (casper-free -> casper) and any slug change. Extra keys here are inert if unsupported; they never break parsing.
name: casper

plugins.name: casper
plugins.description: Your AI said done. Casper makes it prove it — 13 judgment skills + CI-tested zero-LLM hooks (claim-evidence, spec-citation, scope-creep) with an append-only verdict ledger and a calibration loop.
